optional.name: serena
optional.install_hint: Provision via Codex-native MCP tooling if your Codex host exposes official MCP registration.

optional.name: context7
optional.install_hint: Provision via Codex-native MCP tooling if your Codex host exposes official MCP registration.

optional.name: github
optional.install_hint: Provision via Codex-native MCP tooling if your Codex host exposes official MCP registration.

optional.name: prompts-chat
optional.install_hint: Provision prompts.chat MCP/API integration in Codex runtime; optional, used by prompt-lookup/prompt-overlay.

optional.name: xan
optional.install_hint: Install xan CLI manually (recommended on Windows: scoop install xan) for large CSV acceleration.

optional.name: fuck-u-code
optional.install_hint: Optional quality-debt analyzer for quality-debt-overlay; install manually only if you want external analyzer hints beyond built-in risk scoring.

optional.name: ivy
optional.install_hint: Optional framework-interop backend for framework-interop-overlay; install manually in Python environment (for example: pip install ivy).

optional.name: leetcuda
optional.install_hint: Optional methodology source for cuda-kernel-overlay; no runtime dependency required. Keep GPL-3.0 boundary: do not vendor upstream code.

notes: Codex install guidance is limited to officially supportable local settings, MCP registration, and optional CLI tooling. Historical Claude-style plugin and hook surfaces are intentionally excluded from the supported Codex install path.
